A

accept(Vehicle) - Method in class rental.filter.AndFilter

accept a vehicle if its brand is the same than the required brand

accept a vehicle if its daily rental price is lower than the maximal price

the collection of vehicles from the agency that are currently rented.

to perform "filter intersections", which amounts to applying the logic between filters.

the object car which is a vehicle

Client - Class in rental
represent clients of a rental agency, the names are supposed to be unique then two Client objects with same name are considered equals
Client(String, int) - Constructor for class rental.Client
create a client with given name and age, two different clients have different names by assumption (no verification)

E

equals(Object) - Method in class rental.Vehicle
